creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #17)
> It may be easier to have poudriere create all the necessary packages and install them with pkg add :)
It isn't true - you need a lot of disk space, a lot of CPU, real and work time to use poudriere if you have several different hardware and software setups with FreeBSD instead just "portmaster -a".
